title: Magelang Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Magelang with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Magelang has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperatures are causing discomfort to the residents, with a relative humidity of 71% and wind speed of 5.4 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
